title: Lucid Mod
description: LucidMod is a clean Fabric PvP utility mod with a cool click GUI
body:
# Lucid Mod

**Lucid Mod** is a clean and lightweight **Fabric client mod** designed to make Minecraft feel smoother and more polished, especially for PvP.

Instead of adding dozens of complicated features, Lucid focuses on **simple, useful modules** that improve your HUD, visuals, and gameplay clarity. Everything is easy to configure, settings are saved automatically, and the interface is designed to keep your screen **clean and uncluttered**.

![The module list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/710b66d48f51ef8df13623c861c92914e2f1f4e6_0.webp)

---

# Modules

## Render

**Low Items**  
Changes the size and position of the items you are holding.  
You can configure it per item, per hand, or apply it to all items. It also allows you to adjust the **fire overlay position** when you are burning and the **shield position**.

**Armor HUD**  
A customizable HUD overlay that displays your armor durability.  
Optionally shows how many **XP bottles are needed to fully repair your armor**.

**Speed Display**  
Shows your current movement speed in either **Blocks Per Second (BPS)** or **Kilometers Per Hour (KPH)**.

**Totem Counter**  
Displays a movable HUD icon showing how many **Totems of Undying** you currently have.

**Notifications**  
Displays small notifications when modules are enabled or disabled.

**Keystrokes**
Very customisable keystrokes module

**Health Alert**
Warns you when your health is low.

## PvP

**Armor Break Warning**  
Displays a warning on your screen when an armor piece reaches a **customizable durability percentage**.

**Pearl Trajectory**  
Shows the predicted landing position of ender pearls before they are thrown.  
⚠️ Some servers may consider this unfair advantage, so check server rules before using it.  
_(Do NOT use on pvp focused servers, eg. catpvp, minemen, mcpvp, pvplegacy, etc.. )_

**Damage Indicator**  
Displays floating damage numbers when entities take damage.

**TNT Timer**  
Shows a floating countdown above primed TNT, indicating how much time is left before it explodes.

**Creeper Timer**  
Shows a floating countdown above ignited creepers, indicating how much time is left before they explode.

**Auto GG**
Automatically sends a gg (or a custom message) when a fight ends.

## Player

**Nick Hider**  
Replaces usernames with `player{number}` to hide identities.  
You can apply it to **yourself, other players, or everyone**, and change skins to **Steve or Alex**.
